SCHEMA nested_functions_test_schema;

(* TYPE                   0 *)
(* ENTITY                 1 *)
(* FUNCTION               2 *)
(* PROCEDURE              1 *)
(* RULE                   1 *)
(* SUBTYPE_CONSTRAINT     0 *)

  ENTITY NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.empty_entity;
  FUNCTION NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.another_top_level_function;
  FUNCTION NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.top_level_function;
    FUNCTION NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.inner_function_in_function;
      FUNCTION NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.deeply_nested_function;
  RULE NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.top_level_rule;
  PROCEDURE NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.top_level_procedure;
    FUNCTION NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.inner_function_in_procedure;
      FUNCTION NESTED_FUNCTIONS_TEST_SCHEMA.nested_in_procedure_function;
